title: Agent Pitbook Unresolved Pit Report
description: A safe report for a reproducible coding-agent or local-tooling failure that no existing Agent Pitbook record answers yet.

short_summary.description: One sentence naming the blocked failure.

agent_or_tool.description: Coding agent, MCP client/server, CLI, package manager, browser tool, or local program involved.

environment.description: OS, architecture, shell, runtime, package manager, versions, sandbox, network, browser, container, permissions, and other constraints.

symptoms_and_exact_errors.description: What failed, exact public error strings, commands, UI action, and observable behavior.

what_was_tried.description: Attempts, workarounds, commands, docs, issue threads, or tool settings already tried.

existing_records_checked.description: Agent Pitbook ids, URLs, or search terms checked before opening this report.

public_reproduction_or_context.description: A minimal public reproduction, redacted command sequence, safe context, or explanation that no public repro is available.
